LanguageData.ELIFUH-60Attack.label: MH-60L DAP Blackhawk (Attack)
LanguageData.ELIFUH-60Attack.description: DESCRIPTION: The MH-60L DAP (Direct Action Penetrator) is a helicopter designed for medium to long range attack runs, sacrificing storage, passenger and fuel capacity to maintain the same speed of its counterpart. BASIC STATS: Health: 1000 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 800kg Speed: 6 Passenger Capacity: 1-4 Fuel Per Tile: 9 Fuel Capacity: 675 Round Trip Range: 37.5 Full Range: 75 Internal Power: 600w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: 4 Precision Run Capacity: 3 Spread: 5 Distance between drops: 4
